analysis.reasoning: Core message: Informational update stating that, as of February 1, most Russia–China flights are suspended except specified Aeroflot routes, and that four Chinese airlines will continue flights to Moscow per an agreement. Evaluation: RU1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not referenced; no mention of the West or moral framing. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system) – The tweet notes a bilateral arrangement with China but does not frame it as an alternative system, multilateralism, or counter-West narrative; it's purely logistical. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner) – No value-laden claims of benevolence, peace, or solidarity; just an operational decision. RU4 (Russian history admirable) – Not applicable. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront) – No claims of superiority or achievement. RU6 (Russia’s culture/nature/heritage) – Not applicable. Conclusion: The tweet is a neutral travel/aviation notice and does not promote any listed narratives.
